text:
Once upon a time, there was an adventurer named Ella who lived deep in the heart of the Whispering Woods. The forest was enchanted with soft melodies, and every tree seemed to whisper secrets to those who listened closely enough.

Ella loved these woods. She had spent countless nights there, listening to the tales of old, searching for hidden treasure, and finding friends in the most unexpected places.

One lazy summer afternoon, Ella decided to wander deeper than ever before. As she walked alone under the boughs of towering oaks, she stumbled upon a clearing that was unlike any she'd seen. There, nestled among sunflowers, sat an old stone bench.

Thinking it just an accidental find, Ella sat down, closing her eyes. A gentle song drifted through the air, a melody she hadn't heard in years.

Suddenly, the bench whispered back. "Welcome."

Ella blinked. "*Who*?"

"The one who sits within."

Curious, Ella leaned forward.
